column3: I hypothesize that extractJsonObject truncated JSON repair conflates bracket types because the diff shows unified depth counter
column6: The current file already has a proper stack-based LIFO repair (pushing '}' for '{' and ']' for '['). The bug was already fixed in this branch.

column3: I hypothesize that countOccurrences has off-by-one because old diff shows index <= haystack.length
column6: Already fixed in this branch — changed from <= to <

column3: I hypothesize that fetchState idle guard prevents showing error messages when config/dictionary fetch fails
column6: The status IS 'idle' during silent dictionary loading (no setFetchState('loading') before the fetch). The guard correctly prevents overwriting user-triggered loading/error states.

column3: I hypothesize that mergedEvidenceSources is dead code in mergeKeywordEntry
column6: It IS used at line 755 for ambiguousEvidenceWasFiltered check

column3: I hypothesize that beforeEntries is dead code in hasHarvestEvidenceProgress
column6: It IS used at line 2909 for evidence comparison

column3: I hypothesize that commentCount/danmakuCount gate can miss users with commentText but zero counts
column6: When user.commentCount===0 && user.danmakuCount===0 but nextCommentText is non-empty, the analysis pipeline is skipped (line 874). This is an edge case where the API reports count discrepancies.

column3: I hypothesize that searchNeedlesForRelevance has infinite loop or incorrect dedup
column6: The function logic is complex but appears correct — no infinite loops, dedup is correct. However, duplicate spreading of aliases could over-weight some terms in relevance scoring.

column3: I hypothesize that coverageProgressDeltaFromHarvest passes wrong key names to check methods in cross-module calls
column6: evidenceGained is produced by summarizeCoverageProgress (line 2865) and consumed by coverageDeltaFromHarvest (line 41). totalEvidenceGained is from coverageDelta for audit reports. Different functions, different key names by design.

column3: I hypothesize that cleanSearchText regex strips kana characters needed for Japanese Bilibili content
column6: \p{Letter} includes Hiragana and Katakana. Only characters outside Han/Letter/Number are stripped.

column3: I hypothesize that boundedInt returns incorrect values for edge-case floats like 2.999
column6: Math.floor correctly floors before clamping. Number.isFinite handles NaN/Infinity. Function is correct.

column3: I hypothesize that responseCache has unbounded memory growth with no eviction of expired entries
column6: Module-level Map has no pruning. Expired entries are only checked on lookup, never actively removed. Over long-running servers, this accumulates. Low severity.
